title: Wider Tab
description: Extends the multiplayer player list (tablist) to fit more players.
body:
# Wider Tab

### What is this mod?
A mod that extends the multiplayer player list (tablist) to fit more players.

### How does it work?
This mod essentially removes the vanilla limit for players shown in a server's player list, to easily see everyone online at once.

![Extended player list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3512ac76cf84f45f6deb8e7460f8d34e74b5ad90.png)
